rationale: Phase 0.5 source-lift required source-side env-driven config refactor (Phase 0.4) and qBittorrent v5 endpoint fix. Both preserved the 133/29/104 tool inventory exactly; the re-pin captures the new HEAD with no change to the tool name set.

Phase 0.4 follow-up: 4 real bugs fixed in env-driven config (cf_default_zone allowlist membership, env_flag whitespace, ingress_host_re trailing-hyphen rejection, UNIFI_PORT empty handling) plus Dockerfile USER 1000 directive and tokenize-based docstring detection. Found by adversarial verify (Step 9 first run, 25 findings, 7 fixed in source + 3 in lift tooling). Tool inventory unchanged.
